G5508.strongs_def: Chios, an island in the Mediterranean

G5503.derivation: feminine of a presumed derivative apparently from the base of G5490 (χάσμα) through the idea of deficiency;
G5503.strongs_def: a widow (as lacking a husband), literally or figuratively

G5546.strongs_def: a Christian, i.e. follower of Christ

G5589.derivation: diminutive from a derivative of the base of G5567 (ψάλλω) (meaning a crumb);

G5544.strongs_def: usefulness, i.e. morally, excellence (in character or demeanor)

G5587.strongs_def: by implication, a slander; probably akin to G5574 (ψεύδομαι)); whispering, i.e. secret detraction

G5521.derivation: feminine of an equivalent perhaps akin to the same as 5514 (from the greenish hue);
G5521.strongs_def: "gall" or bile, i.e. (by analogy) poison or an anodyne (wormwood, poppy, etc.)

G5533.derivation: from a derivative of G5531 (χράω) and G3781 (ὀφειλέτης);

G5547.strongs_def: anointed, i.e. the Messiah, an epithet of Jesus

G5543.strongs_def: employed, i.e. (by implication) useful (in manner or morals)
G5543.usage: kind(2x), easy(1x), better(1x), goodness(1x), good(1x), gracious(1x)

G5599.strongs_def: as a sign of the vocative case, O; as a note of exclamation, oh

G5524.derivation: from a compound of G5525 (χορός) and G71 (ἄγω);
G5524.strongs_def: to be a dance-leader, i.e. (generally) to furnish

G5594.strongs_def: to breathe (voluntarily but gently, thus differing on the one hand from G4154 (πνέω), which denotes properly a forcible respiration; and on the other from the base of G109 (ἀήρ), which refers properly to an inanimate breeze), i.e. (by implication, of reduction of temperature by evaporation) to chill (figuratively)

G5569.strongs_def: a spurious brother, i.e. pretended associate

G5595.strongs_def: to supply with bits, i.e. (generally) to nourish

G5574.derivation: middle voice of an apparently primary verb;
G5574.strongs_def: to utter an untruth or attempt to deceive by falsehood

G5578.strongs_def: a spurious prophet, i.e. pretended foreteller or religious impostor

G5517.strongs_def: dusty or dirty (soil-like), i.e. (by implication) terrene

G5561.derivation: feminine of a derivative of the base of G5490 (χάσμα) through the idea of empty expanse;
G5561.strongs_def: room, i.e. a space of territory (more or less extensive; often including its inhabitants)
G5561.kjv_def: coast, county, fields, ground, land, region
G5561.usage: country(15x), region(5x), land(3x), field(2x), ground(1x), coast(1x)

G5535.strongs_def: to make (i.e. have) necessity, i.e. be in want of

G5522.strongs_def: a heap (as poured out), i.e. rubbish; loose dirt

G5500.derivation: from a comparative of G5495 (χείρ) and (to stretch);
G5500.strongs_def: to be a hand-reacher or voter (by raising the hand), i.e. (generally) to select or appoint

G5540.strongs_def: employment, i.e. (specially), sexual intercourse (as an occupation of the body)

G5573.strongs_def: mendacious, i.e. promulgating erroneous Christian doctrine

G5551.derivation: from a presumed compound of G5550 (χρόνος) and the base of G5147 (τρίβος);
G5551.strongs_def: to be a time-wearer, i.e. to procrastinate (linger)

G5536.strongs_def: something useful or needed, i.e. wealth, price

G5575.derivation: from G5571 (ψευδής) and a kindred form of G3144 (μάρτυς);
G5575.strongs_def: a spurious witness, i.e. bearer of untrue testimony

G5501.strongs_def: from an obsolete equivalent (of uncertain derivation); more evil or aggravated (physically, mentally or morally)

G5562.strongs_def: to be in (give) space, i.e. (intransitively) to pass, enter, or (transitively) to hold, admit (literally or figuratively)
G5562.kjv_def: come, contain, go, have place, (can, be room to) receive

G5554.strongs_def: gold-ringed, i.e. wearing a golden finger-ring or similar jewelry

G5568.strongs_def: a set piece of music, i.e. a sacred ode (accompanied with the voice, harp or other instrument; a "psalm"); collectively, the book of the Psalms

G5584.derivation: from the base of G5567 (ψάλλω) (compare G5586 (ψῆφος));
G5584.strongs_def: to manipulate, i.e. verify by contact; figuratively, to search for

G5528.strongs_def: a "court" or "garden", i.e. (by implication, of pasture) herbage or vegetation

G5534.derivation: third person singular of the same as G5530 (χράομαι) or G5531 (χράω) used impersonally;

G5572.strongs_def: a spurious teacher, i.e. propagator of erroneous Christian doctrine

G5504.strongs_def: "yesterday"; by extension, in time past or hitherto

G5541.strongs_def: to show oneself useful, i.e. act benevolently

G5596.derivation: diminutive from a derivative of the base of G5597 (ψώχω);
G5596.strongs_def: a crumb or morsel (as if rubbed off), i.e. a mouthful

G5590.strongs_def: breath, i.e. (by implication) spirit, abstractly or concretely (the animal sentient principle only; thus distinguished on the one hand from G4151 (πνεῦμα), which is the rational and immortal soul; and on the other from G2222 (ζωή), which is mere vitality, even of plants: these terms thus exactly correspond respectively to the Hebrew H05315, H07307 and H02416)
G5590.kjv_def: heart (+ -ily), life, mind, soul, + us, + you

G5564.strongs_def: a spot or plot of ground
G5564.kjv_def: field, land, parcel of ground, place, possession

G5567.derivation: probably strengthened from (to rub or touch the surface;
G5567.strongs_def: compare G5597 (ψώχω)); to twitch or twang, i.e. to play on a stringed instrument (celebrate the divine worship with music and accompanying odes)

G5531.derivation: probably the same as the base of G5530 (χράομαι);

G5570.strongs_def: a spurious apostle, i.e. pretended pracher

G5518.strongs_def: a chœnix or certain dry measure

G5565.strongs_def: at a space, i.e. separately or apart from (often as preposition)

G5516.derivation: the 22nd, 14th and an obsolete letter (G4742 (στίγμα) as a cross) of the Greek alphabet (intermediate between the 5th and 6th), used as numbers; denoting respectively 600, 60 and 6;

G5558.strongs_def: to gild, i.e. bespangle with golden ornaments

G5542.derivation: from a compound of G5543 (χρηστός) and G3004 (λέγω);

G5559.derivation: probably akin to the base of G5530 (χράομαι) through the idea of handling;
G5559.strongs_def: the body (properly, its surface or skin)

G5512.derivation: from a derivative probably of G5491 (χεῖλος);
G5512.strongs_def: to throw out the lip, i.e. jeer at

G5532.derivation: from the base of G5530 (χράομαι) or G5534 (χρή);
G5532.strongs_def: employment, i.e. an affair; also (by implication) occasion, demand, requirement or destitution
G5532.kjv_def: business, lack, necessary(-ity), need(-ful), use, want
G5532.usage: need(25x), necessity(3x), use(2x), needful(1x), necessary(1x), business(1x), lack(1x), wants(1x)

G5553.strongs_def: a golden article, i.e. gold plating, ornament, or coin

G5530.derivation: middle voice of a primary verb (perhaps rather from G5495 (χείρ), to handle);
G5530.strongs_def: to furnish what is needed; (give an oracle, "graze" (touch slightly), light upon, etc.), i.e. (by implication) to employ or (by extension) to act towards one in a given manner

G5550.strongs_def: a space of time (in general, and thus properly distinguished from G2540 (καιρός), which designates a fixed or special occasion; and from G165 (αἰών), which denotes a particular period) or interval; by extension, an individual opportunity; by implication, delay
G5550.kjv_def: + years old, season, space, (X often-)time(-s), (a) while

G5591.strongs_def: sensitive, i.e. animate (in distinction on the one hand from G4152 (πνευματικός), which is the higher or renovated nature; and on the other from G5446 (φυσικός), which is the lower or bestial nature)

G5548.derivation: probably akin to G5530 (χράομαι) through the idea of contact;
G5548.strongs_def: to smear or rub with oil, i.e. (by implication) to consecrate to an office or religious service

G5510.derivation: perhaps akin to the base of G5490 (χάσμα) (G5465 (χαλάω)) or G5494 (χειμών) (as descending or empty);

G5598.strongs_def: the last letter of the Greek alphabet, i.e. (figuratively) the finality

G5557.derivation: perhaps from the base of G5530 (χράομαι) (through the idea of the utility of the metal);
G5557.strongs_def: gold; by extension, a golden article, as an ornament or coin

G5526.strongs_def: to fodder, i.e. (generally) to gorge (supply food in abundance)

G5514.derivation: feminine of apparently a primary word;

G5506.strongs_def: the commander of a thousand soldiers ("chiliarch"; i.e. colonel

G5537.strongs_def: to utter an oracle (compare the original sense of G5530 (χράομαι)), i.e. divinely intimate; by implication, (compare the secular sense of G5532 (χρεία)) to constitute a firm for business, i.e. (generally) bear as a title
G5537.kjv_def: be called, be admonished (warned) of God, reveal, speak

G5597.derivation: prolongation from the same base as G5567 (ψάλλω);
G5597.strongs_def: to triturate, i.e. (by analogy) to rub out (kernels from husks with the fingers or hand)

G5520.strongs_def: to be bilious, i.e. (by implication) irritable (enraged, "choleric")

G5586.strongs_def: a pebble (as worn smooth by handling), i.e. (by implication, of use as a counter or ballot) a verdict (of acquittal) or ticket (of admission); a vote

G5545.strongs_def: an unguent or smearing, i.e. (figuratively) the special endowment ("chrism") of the Holy Spirit

G5576.strongs_def: to be an untrue testifier, i.e. offer falsehood in evidence

G5563.strongs_def: to place room between, i.e. part; reflexively, to go away

G5585.strongs_def: to use pebbles in enumeration, i.e. (generally) to compute
